reasons: Detected training-checkpoint keys such as epoch/optimizer/model_state_dict.

assumptions: Recovered frontend tensors use canonical single-channel NCHW layout before any runtime-specific layout adaptation.

Generated board runtime reconstructs the frontend in canonical NCHW order and then adapts it into the TFLite input layout.
